overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character walking through a snowy mountain village path at night. The scene features atmospheric blue lighting, warm vintage street lamps, snow-covered ground, and gothic architecture, with the character progressing from a forested path toward a village gate.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered forest path with vintage street lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the snow-covered path, approaching distant figures ahead

notable_agents.action: two villagers walking ahead on the path, moving away from camera

entered.detail: snow-packed trail with visible footprints and tire tracks
dense evergreen trees lining the right side of the path
ornate black lampposts with warm orange glow illuminating the snow
low stone wall running parallel to the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a snow-covered forest path at night, flanked by dense pine trees on the right and a stone wall on the left. Vintage street lamps cast warm pools of light on the blue-tinted snow ahead, while two distant villagers walk further up the path in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain vista path with open views

events.description: path opens to reveal large snow-covered mountain on the right as trees recede

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the forest opens up to reveal mountain scenery

entered.detail: large snow-covered mountain slope illuminated by moonlight against dark blue sky

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses, the dense forest gives way to an open vista revealing a massive snow-covered mountain on the right. The path continues through the snowy landscape with scattered trees, and the street lamps now line the right side of the path, casting long shadows on the snow.

events.description: cable car structure with hanging chairs becomes visible on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking past the cable car infrastructure while approaching the village outskirts

entered.detail: ski lift cable car with red chairs suspended on steel framework
tall steel support pylon for the cable car system

segments.scene_description: The path continues past a cable car installation with red chairs suspended from overhead cables on the right. Stone walls begin to appear along the path edges as the character approaches the village perimeter, with the mountain vista now behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: village entrance with stone archway gate

events.description: approaching illuminated village gate with stone archway and lit windows

agents.ego_description: walking toward and approaching the village gate entrance, ascending slightly

entered.detail: large stone archway entrance with wooden gates and warm interior lighting
ornate stone balustrades lining both sides of the path
traditional wooden building with glowing windows visible through the gate

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the village entrance, walking between stone railings toward a large illuminated archway gate. Warm light glows from windows within the village beyond the gate, contrasting with the cold blue snowscape, as the path ascends slightly toward the entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a snowy mountain path that transitions from a secluded forest trail into the illuminated entrance of a gothic village. It begins with the character walking between dense pine trees and a stone wall, where vintage street lamps cast warm pools of light across the blue-tinted snow. As the forest thins, the scene opens into a wide vista revealing a massive snow-covered mountain to the right, with the lamps now lining the path to create long, stretching shadows. The camera then progresses past a cable car installation with suspended red chairs before the mountain vista recedes and stone railings begin to frame the route. Finally, the path ascends slightly toward a large illuminated archway gate, where the cold blue landscape gives way to the warm glow of windows within the village beyond.
